title: apium larranagum
intro: Apium larranagum, also known as Wild Celery or Sea Celery, is a plant species that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae) and is native to the coastal regions of Australia. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Apium larranagum include its ability to aid digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of Apium larranagum can be made by infusing the leaves or roots in water or using them as a tea, with the fresh or dried plant also being used in salads and as a cooking herb.
